name: FFmpeg Canvas
description: Compose safe, tokenized FFmpeg transforms for active Canvas media, including paired video-only and audio-only separation outputs.

poster.alt: FFmpeg Canvas workflow selecting a managed video node, composing a tokenized argv, running local FFmpeg, and saving the verified output as a new Canvas node.

animation.alt: Animated FFmpeg Canvas workflow preserving a managed source, building FFmpeg arguments, executing locally, and admitting the verified result as a new Canvas node.
